title: Brevo Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Brevo review: all-in-one CRM with email, SMS, WhatsApp & live chat. Free tier supports 100K contacts. Rated 4.5/5 on G2.
h1: Brevo Review: Comprehensive All-in-One CRM and Email Marketing Platform
intro: Brevo is an all-in-one CRM suite that combines email marketing with SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, and a full CRM platform. Founded in 2012, it's designed for businesses looking to consolidate multiple communication channels into a single tool. It's best for companies seeking affordable transactional email capabilities alongside traditional marketing campaigns.
verdict: Brevo excels as a budget-friendly, feature-rich alternative to more expensive standalone email marketing tools, particularly for businesses needing multi-channel communication. While its generous free tier and affordable paid plans are compelling, the interface can feel overwhelming for absolute beginners, and some advanced features require higher-tier plans.
pros: Exceptional free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers with no time limits
Multi-channel marketing across email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat from one platform
Robust transactional email API for developers and technical implementations
Competitive pricing starting at $25/month with strong value for feature set
High user satisfaction ratings (4.5 on G2, 4.3 on Trustpilot)
cons: Steep learning curve due to packed feature set and complex interface for newcomers
Some advanced automation and segmentation features locked behind higher pricing tiers
Customer support responsiveness can be inconsistent, particularly for free tier users
pricing_summary: Brevo offers a completely free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers with essential features, making it accessible for startups and small businesses. Paid plans begin at $25/month and scale based on feature needs, with SMS and premium automation available at higher tiers.
best_for_detail: Brevo is ideal for businesses that need transactional email capabilities combined with marketing automation, particularly those sending high volumes of transactional messages like order confirmations or password resets. It's also excellent for companies wanting to consolidate multiple communication channels (email, SMS, WhatsApp) without investing in several separate tools.

faq.a: Yes, Brevo offers a genuinely free tier that supports up to 100,000 subscribers indefinitely with core email marketing features included. There are no credit card requirements or time-limited trials, making it one of the most generous free email marketing options available.

faq.q: What is Brevo best used for?
faq.a: Brevo excels at transactional email delivery combined with multi-channel marketing campaigns. It's particularly well-suited for businesses needing to send both automated transactional messages and promotional campaigns through email, SMS, and WhatsApp from a unified platform.

While Brevo's free tier is accessible to beginners, the platform's comprehensive feature set can feel overwhelming initially. Beginners may benefit from its straightforward email campaign builder, but advanced CRM features require a steeper learning curve compared to more beginner-focused tools.

faq.q: Does Brevo have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Brevo operates an active affiliate program offering €5 per free signup and €100 per paid conversion. This makes it an attractive option for affiliate marketers and agencies looking to generate recurring revenue.
